headline: Molina Healthcare (MOH) Stock After Illinois Contract Win And Upgrade Is The Valuation Discount Real
summary: Molina Healthcare (MOH) is back in focus after its Illinois subsidiary secured a HealthChoice Illinois Medicaid Managed Care contract, along with improving Q1 2026 margins and a recent upgrade from Bank of America that lifted investor interest. See our latest analysis for Molina Healthcare. The contract win, improving Q1 2026 margins and Bank of America upgrade have come alongside a 36.7% 90 day share price return, although the 1 year total shareholder return is down 32.8%. This suggests that...
